steps.title: Find the lower bound for input
steps.content:
Use the second inequality to identify the allowed values of $x$.
$$3x\gt 13$$
$$x\gt \frac{13}{3}$$

steps.title: Convert it to a lower bound
steps.content:
The expression $3x-2$ is smallest at the boundary $x=\frac{13}{3}$.
$$3(\frac{13}{3})-2=13-2=11$$
Since $x$ must be greater than that boundary, $3x-2$ must be greater than $11$. Thus $y\gt 11$. The answer is B.
